results.engine_gap: graveyard-targeting + flying-counter add + type-changing ('it's a Spirit in addition...')
results.notes: Combination of grave-target return + counter add + type rewrite needs three engine pieces; type rewrite is the blocker.

results.engine_gap: becomes artifact-creature with overwritten base P/T + collect-evidence X-cost branch
results.notes: Type-overwrite + base-P/T overwrite + variable cost branch are all engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: owner-of-spell-or-permanent puts on top/bottom of library (stack manipulation + permanent-to-library moves with a player choice)
results.notes: Stack-target choice is supported but the top-or-bottom-of-library player choice + spell-from-stack-to-library is not; closer to a Sudden Setback / Beast Within hybrid.

Wired modal: mode 0 opens a discard-2 choice on the targeted opponent; mode 1 reveals their hand and prompts the caster to pick a nonland to discard. Uses create_modal_choice + create_discard_choice + create_hand_reveal_choice.

results.engine_gap: destroy-all-creatures (doable) chained with collect-evidence cascade (exile by-name from grave/hand/library) — name-based search across multiple zones not in engine
results.notes: Destroy-all is doable but the cascade is the load-bearing effect; partial wiring would mislead the AI. Left whole.

results.engine_gap: collect-evidence rider (greatest-power version) is left unimplemented; we always run the basic 'each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice' mode
results.notes: Wired with a per-opponent sacrifice choice via create_sacrifice_choice. Multiple opponents queue sequential prompts (matches existing Pick Your Poison pattern).

results.engine_gap: graveyard-target return-to-battlefield + suspect mechanic
results.notes: Suspect tracking (menace + can't block flag) is engine gap; partial wiring would skip the rider.
Wired: opens a target choice over creature cards in caster's graveyard (min 0, max 2). Selected cards are returned to caster's hand via ZONE_CHANGE.

results.engine_gap: X-cost spell + face-down library exile + cast-from-exile-with-color-flexibility
results.notes: Three engine gaps stacked; cast-from-exile permission with mana-flexibility especially missing.

results.engine_gap: X-based on artifact-deaths-this-turn counter + impulse-cast from exile + delayed end-step return
results.notes: Multiple engine gaps; the destroy-all-artifacts portion alone would be misleading.

results.engine_gap: turn-face-up + cloak (face-down zone manipulation)
results.notes: Both modes target face-down/disguise mechanic which the engine partially supports but not via spell-targeting.

results.engine_gap: delayed-trigger Detective token on death-this-turn (engine-gap)
results.notes: Wired the +2/+0 + haste pump on a chosen caster creature via PT_MODIFICATION + KEYWORD_GRANT. Death rider deferred.

results.engine_gap: 'differently named creature tokens' is approximated by counting distinct names of token-flagged creatures the caster controls (post-creation Plant)
results.notes: Emits OBJECT_CREATED (Plant 0/1 green) + DRAW(count). Best-effort token-name counting via obj.state.is_token.

results.engine_gap: variable +X/+X based on creature count + reach grant (variable PT_MODIFICATION amount not supported in current pump model)
results.notes: Engine doesn't support variable PT modifiers computed at resolution time without extra plumbing.
Wired chained target choices: pick own creature (attacker), then pick opp creature/planeswalker (target). DAMAGE event uses get_power(attacker).

results.engine_gap: look-at-top-N + cloak (face-down ETB system)
results.notes: Cloak is a placement onto battlefield face-down; engine has face-down zone but no spell-driven cloak entry yet.

results.engine_gap: look-and-conditionally-play-creature-tapped + bottom-rest-randomized
results.notes: Mostly the play-from-library-tapped with haste rider; engine gap.

results.engine_gap: discard-2-then-conditional-X-damage based on greatest MV among discarded cards
results.notes: 'When you do' delayed trigger off the discard event is engine gap; X damage tied to that data flow.

results.engine_gap: multi-target graveyard return for 3 different card types + becomes-5/5-creature type rewrite
results.notes: Type-line rewrite with overwritten base P/T is the load-bearing piece; engine gap.

results.engine_gap: collect-evidence X cost is ignored (engine gap)
results.notes: Wired chained 'destroy up to one' choices for artifact, creature, enchantment, planeswalker (each min 0 / max 1). Each pool is opened only if non-empty.

results.engine_gap: X-cost any-target damage + put X land cards from hand and/or graveyard onto battlefield tapped
results.notes: Multi-zone batch land entry + X-cost are engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: Aftermath / split card (// in mana_cost) — empty text means card has no resolve to write
results.notes: Aftermath split cards ('//' in cost) need split-card support and an aftermath cast permission; empty text is the symptom.

results.engine_gap: Aftermath / split card
results.notes: Same as CEASE.

results.engine_gap: Aftermath / split card
results.notes: Same as CEASE.

results.engine_gap: Aftermath / split card
results.notes: Same as CEASE.

results.engine_gap: Aftermath / split card
results.notes: Same as CEASE.
